- Non-slip bottom with a stable, non-slip silicone pad to prevent tipping.

✨ [Large Diameter Design]Hands can go deep into the kettle body to clean, worry-free and hygienic.

aiTexts: This 3L Electric Kettle features a durable food-grade stainless steel inner liner and a thickened body for long-lasting use.
Powered at 1500W with bottom-up circulating heating, it boils water quickly and evenly, ideal for 2-5 persons.
Safety is ensured through multi-layer anti-scalding design, a safety locking lid, automatic power-off, and a high-quality thermostat.
The kettle includes a large diameter opening for easy cleaning and a cord winder for convenient storage.
Its modern design and 3-pin SG plug make it suitable for household daily use.

1.8L Electric Kettle: A Masterpiece of Functionality and Style!

Multi-Function Design: This kettle is not just for boiling water! With 18 major functions, including a 24-hour appointment setting and a 10-minute pot-lifting memory, it caters to all your kitchen needs.

title: TOYOYOTA Foldable Electric Kettle Mini 600ml Tea Pot Portable 110V/220V Silicone Kettle Travel Use
detail_text: Material:Stainless Steel/Silicone Name:Folding Kettle Size: As shown in the picture Quantity1pcs Capacity: 600ml Brand new and high quality! Color: White/Pink/Blue 1.Portable and Collapsible Design: This 600ml travel electric kettle is crafted with a foldable, food-grade silicone body, making it lightweight and easy to pack. Its compact design ensures it fits neatly into your luggage, perfect for travel, camping, and hotel stays. 2.Quick Boiling for On-the-Go Convenience: Enjoy hot beverages or quick meals in minutes. This portable kettle rapidly boils up to 600ml of water, making it ideal for tea, coffee, instant noodles, and more perfect for solo travelers or small groups. 3.110V US Plug Compatibility: Specifically designed for 110V outlets, this collapsible electric kettle is ready for use in the United States without the need for a voltage converter. Ideal for domestic travel, road trips, and hotel stays. 4.Safe and Food-Grade Silicone Construction: Made from high-quality, BPA-free food-grade silicone, this electric kettle is both heat-resistant and durable. It ensures safe boiling with no harmful chemicals, offering peace of mind for frequent travelers. 5.Versatile Travel Essential with Easy-Pour Design: Whether you're camping, staying in a hotel, or on a road trip, this compact electric kettle is your go-to for hot water. Features an ergonomic handle for easy pouring and a secure lid to prevent spills, ensuring a hassle-free experience wherever you are. Package includes: 1 x Folding Kettle Notion 1. Please allow 1-3 cm(0.39-1.18 in) difference due to manual measurement. 2. 2. Please allow slight color difference. Due to differences in monitors and lighting, pictures may not reflect the actual color of the item.
detail_html:
Material:Stainless Steel/Silicone

Name:Folding Kettle

Size: As shown in the picture

Quantity1pcs

Capacity: 600ml

Brand new and high quality!

Color: White/Pink/Blue

1.Portable and Collapsible Design: This 600ml travel electric kettle is crafted with a foldable, food-grade silicone body, making it lightweight and easy to pack. Its compact design ensures it fits neatly into your luggage, perfect for travel, camping, and hotel stays.

2.Quick Boiling for On-the-Go Convenience: Enjoy hot beverages or quick meals in minutes. This portable kettle rapidly boils up to 600ml of water, making it ideal for tea, coffee, instant noodles, and more perfect for solo travelers or small groups.

3.110V US Plug Compatibility: Specifically designed for 110V outlets, this collapsible electric kettle is ready for use in the United States without the need for a voltage converter. Ideal for domestic travel, road trips, and hotel stays.

4.Safe and Food-Grade Silicone Construction: Made from high-quality, BPA-free food-grade silicone, this electric kettle is both heat-resistant and durable. It ensures safe boiling with no harmful chemicals, offering peace of mind for frequent travelers.

5.Versatile Travel Essential with Easy-Pour Design: Whether you're camping, staying in a hotel, or on a road trip, this compact electric kettle is your go-to for hot water. Features an ergonomic handle for easy pouring and a secure lid to prevent spills, ensuring a hassle-free experience wherever you are.

Package includes: 1 x Folding Kettle

Notion

1. Please allow 1-3 cm(0.39-1.18 in) difference due to manual measurement.

2. 2. Please allow slight color difference. Due to differences in monitors and lighting, pictures may not reflect the actual color of the item.

1.Portable and Collapsible Design: This 600ml travel electric kettle is crafted with a foldable, food-grade silicone body, making it lightweight and easy to pack. Its compact design ensures it fits neatly into your luggage, perfect for travel, camping, and hotel stays.

2.Quick Boiling for On-the-Go Convenience: Enjoy hot beverages or quick meals in minutes. This portable kettle rapidly boils up to 600ml of water, making it ideal for tea, coffee, instant noodles, and more perfect for solo travelers or small groups.

3.110V US Plug Compatibility: Specifically designed for 110V outlets, this collapsible electric kettle is ready for use in the United States without the need for a voltage converter. Ideal for domestic travel, road trips, and hotel stays.

4.Safe and Food-Grade Silicone Construction: Made from high-quality, BPA-free food-grade silicone, this electric kettle is both heat-resistant and durable. It ensures safe boiling with no harmful chemicals, offering peace of mind for frequent travelers.

5.Versatile Travel Essential with Easy-Pour Design: Whether you're camping, staying in a hotel, or on a road trip, this compact electric kettle is your go-to for hot water. page_json.description: Material: Stainless Steel/Silicone. Capacity: 600ml. Brand new and high quality. Name: Folding Kettle. Quantity1pcs. Material: Stainless Steel/Silicone. Name: Folding Kettle. Size: As shown in the picture. Quantity1pcs. Capacity: 600ml. Brand new and high quality. Color: White/Pink/Blue. 1. Portable and Collapsible Design: This 600ml travel electric kettle is crafted with a foldable, food-grade silicone body, making it lightweight and easy to pack. Its compact design ensures it fits neatly into your luggage, perfect for travel, camping, and hotel stays. 2. Quick Boiling for On-the-Go Convenience: Enjoy hot beverages or quick meals in minutes. This portable kettle rapidly boils up to 600ml of water, making it ideal for tea, coffee, instant noodles, and more perfect for solo travelers or small groups. 3.110V US Plug Compatibility: Specifically designed for 110V outlets, this collapsible electric kettle is ready for use in the United States without the need for a voltage converter. title: Peskoe | Compact Insulated Electric Kettle
detail_text: Official Hemisphere Brand As an official Hemisphere product, you can trust in its reliability and quality, backed by a trusted brand name. Compact Hotel Size Designed for hotel use, its compact size makes it ideal for small spaces, yet it still provides ample water heating capacity. Automated Temperature Control This electric water kettle features automated temperature control, ensuring your water is boiled to perfection every time. 304 Stainless Steel Material Crafted from high-quality 304 stainless steel, this kettle is not only durable but also rust-resistant, promising long-lasting use. Automatic Insulation The automatic insulation feature keeps your water hot for longer periods, making it perfect for those who need a constant supply of hot water.
detail_html:
Official Hemisphere Brand



As an official Hemisphere product, you can trust in its reliability and quality, backed by a trusted brand name.






Compact Hotel Size



Designed for hotel use, its compact size makes it ideal for small spaces, yet it still provides ample water heating capacity.






Automated Temperature Control



This electric water kettle features automated temperature control, ensuring your water is boiled to perfection every time.






304 Stainless Steel Material



Crafted from high-quality 304 stainless steel, this kettle is not only durable but also rust-resistant, promising long-lasting use.






Automatic Insulation



The automatic insulation feature keeps your water hot for longer periods, making it perfect for those who need a constant supply of hot water.

detail_html:
✨We are currently the only ones in Singapore with a safety mark for this product, assuring you of its exceptional quality. ✨

About the product:

●Digital display screen, check boiling water temperature at any time, quick selection function.

●Selected materials, durable, safe and environmentally friendly, non-toxic and harmless, harmless to human health.

●Double Protection: Air hole leak proof design + Water shortage automatic power off design

●Use double-layer heat insulation design, safe and not hot rapid heating.

●It has a waterproof design protection, Small size, light weight, easy to carry, can be taken on the plane.

Specification

Product name: Portable electric water cup

Product size: 80 * 230mm

Heating mode: Chassis heating

Capacity: 500ML

Power: 300W

Product weight: 520g

Control mode: Inductive touch screen

Product material: 304 stainless steel (liner/inner cover), PP (shell)

Please note:

This capacity can only be marked as 450ML, the actual capacity is 500ML

📣NOTICE:

1. Please allow 1-2cm of variances due to manual measurements.

2. Colour variations in devices or monitor screens may not reflect actual product colour.

⏲️Customer service hours: 9:00～12:00 every day; 13:30～18:30

🚀FEEDBACK:

1. If you have any problem with your order, please contact us, we will try our best to provide satisfactory solution ASAP.

2. Product carton maybe out of shape due to shipment handling but the item is in good condition.

3. There maybe slow reply outside office hours. Thank you for your patience as we will reply at our earliest availability.

title: 2L Stainless Steel Electric Kettle Silver Gray Base Separation Desion Rust-resistant Durable for Home Office During Travel
detail_text: Description: We are providing anelectric kettle with classic and safe design! It is a convenient and fast household appliance used for boiling water and insulation, which is made of stainless steel to ensure safety and durability. For easy use, it is equipped with a handle and a switch button. The handle is comfortable and convenient for customers to pick up and pour water. The switch button is used to start and stop the heating process. It is simple to use and can meet people's daily needs for coffee, tea or beverages. Whether it's at home, in the office, or during travel, it's all a practical choice. Features: [HIGH-QUALITY STAINLESS STAIL] Mainly made of food-grade stainless steel, this electric kettle is safe, harmless, durable, and rust-resistant. [2L CAPACITY] The electric kettle has a total capacity of 2 liters, no need to frequently boil water, which could meet daily usage needs. [EASY TO USE] It has one button to switch quickly. When it is pressed, the indicator light is on and starts working. [SAFETY DESIGN] Safe to use, when the water is boiling, the indicator light will turn off and the power will automatically cut off to ensure safety. [BASE SEPARATION DESIGN] The kettle and charging base are separated from each other, making it more convenient and safer to use. Specifications: -Item Name: Electric Kettle -Material: Stainless Steel -Color: Silver Gray -Product Dimensions: 23*20.3*16.5cm / 9.06*7.99*6.5in -G.W.: 700g / 24.69oz -Plug type: 220V EU plug Package List: 1 * Kettle Notes: 1. Size information is just for reference only, please allow 1-2cm (0.4-0.8") differences due to manual measurement, thanks. 2. Item color displayed in photos may be showing slightly different on your monitor since monitors are not calibrated the same.

seo.highlightText: The 2L Stainless Steel Electric Kettle is designed for both home and office use, making it a versatile addition to your kitchen.｜Its sleek silver-gray finish and rust-resistant stainless steel construction ensure durability and style.｜With a generous 2-liter capacity, it’s perfect for brewing tea or coffee for multiple servings.｜The base separation design enhances safety and convenience, allowing for easy pouring and cleaning.｜Ideal for travel, this kettle combines functionality with a modern aesthetic, catering to the needs of busy individuals and families alike.

detail_text: Portable Design Its compact size and lightweight construction make it easy to move around, perfect for small spaces or travel. Versatile Use Suitable for various kitchen appliances, this electric pot can be used for boiling water, heating milk, or even cooking pasta. Large Capacity With a generous 1.5L capacity, this kettle can serve multiple cups of hot water, ideal for families or offices. Electric Kettle Functionality Efficient electric kettle design allows for quick and easy boiling of water, perfect for tea or coffee preparation. Stainless Steel Material Crafted from high-quality stainless steel, ensuring durability and longevity for your daily use.

Brand：SPOETRY


Name: 1.7L Electric Kettles


220-240V 50-60Hz 1500W


Capacity: 1.7L


ON/OFF switch with light indicator


Automatically turns off when water boils


Complete Stainless Steel body, no welding or sealing, easy to clean

Anti-slip feet design

5. 1.7L large capacity, meets the drinking needs of multiple people.


6. Two-stage damping lid opening, safe protection against scalding.


📦Packing List📦


1*Electric Kettles

1*Instruction manual

title: Iona 1.8L Stainless Steel Electric Kettle - Keep Warm Cool Touch Cordless Kettle Electric GLK1826
detail_text: The 1.8L IONA Double-Wall Electric Kettle is crafted with a plastic outer shell that houses a stainless steel interior for a safe and clean boil. Advance thermostat technology protects your kettle and your home with auto shut off for when your boiler is boiling and dry-run protection. You will always know when your water is ready with the blue Led indicator light, which stays on while the water heats up and turns off when it boils. The kettle can conveniently boil up to 7 cups of water in minutes, and can be taken off the base for cordless use. 1 click button 24 hour keep warm. ● Features: • Safe tech and Auto shut off boil dry protection. • Seamless stainless steel design for easy, residue free clean-up. • Easy to clean and fill with wide mouth. • Double wall construction, boils faster and uses less energy, keeps water warm longer and cool to touch. • Nice design with shiny black exterior. • Cordless with 360º rotation. • Anti-splash lid effectively conducive to the fall of water droplets. • Capacity 1.8L prepares up to 7 cups. • 24 hour 60°C keep warm ● Specification: Voltage: 220-240V~, 50Hz. 1800-2200W GLK1826B Barcode: 8886432505243 GLK1826G Barcode: 8886432505250 Product Dimension: L22.5 x W15.5 x H15.5cm Net Weight: 1.13kg Capacity: 1.8L ● Others: 1 Year Local Warranty Safety Mark: 240085-12 3 Pin SG Plug All electric kettles have bases that are prone to mineral build-up. We recommend cleaning your kettle every 1-2 months to ensure the freshest flavour. We can buy white vinegar in supermarkets, put 10% of white vinegar into the kettle, then fill it with water. Boil it and then leave it for an hour, then just brush it off.
detail_html:
The 1.8L IONA Double-Wall Electric Kettle is crafted with a plastic outer shell that houses a stainless steel interior for a safe and clean boil. Advance thermostat technology protects your kettle and your home with auto shut off for when your boiler is boiling and dry-run protection. You will always know when your water is ready with the blue Led indicator light, which stays on while the water heats up and turns off when it boils. The kettle can conveniently boil up to 7 cups of water in minutes, and can be taken off the base for cordless use. 1 click button 24 hour keep warm.

● Features:

• Safe tech and Auto shut off boil dry protection.

• Seamless stainless steel design for easy, residue free clean-up.

• Easy to clean and fill with wide mouth.

• Double wall construction, boils faster and uses less energy, keeps water warm longer and cool to touch.

• Nice design with shiny black exterior.

• Cordless with 360º rotation.

• Anti-splash lid effectively conducive to the fall of water droplets.

• Capacity 1.8L prepares up to 7 cups.

• 24 hour 60°C keep warm 

● Specification:

Voltage: 220-240V~, 50Hz. 1800-2200W

GLK1826B Barcode: 8886432505243

GLK1826G Barcode: 8886432505250

Product Dimension: L22.5 x W15.5 x H15.5cm

Net Weight: 1.13kg

Capacity: 1.8L

● Others:

1 Year Local Warranty

Safety Mark: 240085-12

3 Pin SG Plug

All electric kettles have bases that are prone to mineral build-up.

We recommend cleaning your kettle every 1-2 months to ensure the freshest flavour.

We can buy white vinegar in supermarkets, put 10% of white vinegar into the kettle, then fill it with water. Boil it and then leave it for an hour, then just brush it off.

Advance thermostat technology protects your kettle and your home with auto shut off for when your boiler is boiling and dry-run protection. You will always know when your water is ready with the blue Led indicator light, which stays on while the water heats up and turns off when it boils. The kettle can conveniently boil up to 7 cups of water in minutes, and can be taken off the base for cordless use. 1 click button 24 hour keep warm. ● Features: • Safe tech and Auto shut off boil dry protection. • Seamless stainless steel design for easy, residue free clean-up. • Easy to clean and fill with wide mouth. • Double wall construction, boils faster and uses less energy, keeps water warm longer and cool to touch. • Nice design with shiny black exterior. • Cordless with 360º rotation. • Anti-splash lid effectively conducive to the fall of water droplets. • Capacity 1.8L prepares up to 7 cups. • 24 hour 60°C keep warm ● Specification: Voltage: 220-240V~, 50Hz. 1800-2200W GLK1826B Barcode: 8886432505243 GLK1826G Barcode: 8886432505250 Product Dimension: L22.5 x W15.5 x H15.5cm Net Weight: 1.13kg Capacity: 1.8L ● Others: 1 Year Local Warranty Safety Mark: 240085-12 3 Pin SG Plug All electric kettles have bases that are prone to mineral build-up.
